subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the honor of presenting thyself before the Most Sacred and Exalted Threshold, what thou didst write hath been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشرف بالمثول فی العتبه المقدسه العلیاء آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
